content.en:
Five days later, the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden couldn't hold on, and her body had been severely eroded by the purple light, so she withdrew from the purple light world.

Only by recovering the eroded body can you enter the purple light world again.

Time passed day by day, and the Yunzi Divine Maiden repaired her body outside the purple light world, but she never saw Ye Tian come out, and she was immediately very surprised.

Because more than ten days have passed at this moment, although Ye Tian's strength is much stronger than her, he still belongs to the category of god generals, and his body has not achieved the body of chaos.

Moreover, she also has an Ice Purple Holy Body, which is enough to be listed as one of the top ten physiques in the chaos, and she can only last for five days, but why did Ye Tian persist for so long?

"Could it be that there are treasures on the body of the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi that can resist the purple light?" Yun Zi Divine Maiden thought so in her heart, but quickly shook her head, the purple light is very special, it can penetrate all treasures and defenses, and directly invade the flesh, she doesn't think that there are any treasures on Ye Tian's body that can resist the purple light.

Moreover, the purple light is helpful for cultivation, if it is resisted by treasures, then the purpose of cultivation will be lost.

She believed that it was impossible for Ye Tian to give up cultivation in order to persist for a little longer.

"Maybe his physique is stronger than my Ice Purple Holy Body!" the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden thought.

On the 20th day, the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden entered the Purple Light World again, and it was the place where she first entered.

Entering the purple light world, the Yun Purple Divine Maiden saw Ye Tian who was cultivating there.

Judging from Ye Tian's condition, although he was still eroded by the purple light, it seemed that he could hold on longer.

Seeing this, the Yun Zi Divine Maiden was shocked.

However, she still cultivated wholeheartedly and didn't pay attention to Ye Tian, after all, she couldn't last too long in the purple light world, so she naturally didn't dare to waste time.

Since it was the second time she had entered the Purple Light World, her body had a certain immunity to the erosion of the Purple Light, so this time the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden persisted for six days before exiting the Purple Light World.

Before leaving, the Yun Zi Priestess found that Ye Tian was still holding on.

Forty days!

Sixty days!

Eighty days!

Ye Tian broke the cognition of the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden again and again, and even held on longer than some weaker mid-Heavenly Mandate Heavenly Monarchs.

Three months later.

Ye Tian's small body was eroded by purple light, although he could continue to persevere, but Ye Tian felt that it was unnecessary, so he chose to quit the purple light world.

The three consecutive months of refining purple light had made Ye Tian progress too much, equivalent to hundreds of thousands of years of penance cultivation in the outside world.

And Ye Tian's Xuanxuan Jue has finally completed a breakthrough, from the seventh layer of the Xuanxu Jue to the Xiaocheng realm, the strength of his physical body has increased a lot, although he is still an eight-star late stage god general, but he is closer to the eight-star peak god general.

After resting in the outside world for more than ten days, Ye Tian completely recovered his body and entered the purple light world again.

This time, Ye Tian had been cultivating for a year before finally choosing to quit the Purple Light World.

In this way, year after year, I don't know how many gods and heavenly monarchs have entered the purple light world, as if the purple light world is the best cultivation treasure land.

In addition, there are also some god generals and heavenly monarchs who have fallen in the purple light world.

It stands to reason that the Heavenly Monarch is so powerful, how could he fall in the Purple Light World?

The main reason is that the purple light erosion in the purple light world is too great, and there are some special treasures in the depths of the purple light world, and those special treasures contain relatively mild purple light, although it can also erode the physical body, but the degree of erosion is too low, and it is a very good cultivation resource.

In addition, there were some areas in the depths of the Purple Light World, and the degree of purple light erosion skyrocketed many times, causing some Heavenly Monarchs to be severely injured by erosion in an instant, and even fell and died after leaving the Purple Light World.

Although some Heavenly Monarchs and Divine Generals fell, there were also lucky people who found treasures from the depths of the Purple Light World, thus increasing their strength in one fell swoop.

For example, a god general in the late stage of the Mandate of Heaven obtained an elixir containing purple light, and after devouring it, he broke the shackles in one fell swoop and was promoted to the peak realm of the Mandate of Heaven, and his strength skyrocketed.

There are also some divine generals who have gained some opportunities and have been promoted to the realm of the Mandate of Heaven and become a Mandate of Heaven Monarch.

But more people are still conservative, only cultivating on the periphery of the purple light world, and they are not greedy.

In the blink of an eye, a hundred years have passed.

On this day, a piece of news came that shocked the entire universe.

A Heavenly Monarch has fallen in the Purple Light World!

How powerful the Heavenly Monarch is in the Heavenly Monarch List, the ordinary Heavenly Mandate Peak Heavenly Monarch is like an ant in the eyes of the Heavenly Monarch List, and he can kill countless people with a wave of his hand.

It's like some ten-star earth lords facing seven or eight-star god generals, is there a comparison between the two?

There is no comparison, and countless ten-star earth lords are far from being able to beat a seven- or eight-star god general, and the Heavenly Monarch is so powerful, far surpassing other heavenly monarchs.

But such a terrifying Heavenly Monarch powerhouse, who could even leapfrog to kill a weaker True Monarch, fell in the Purple Light World, which was really shocking.

Soon, the specific news came.

It turned out that this Heavenly Monarch entered the core area, and stayed in the core area for too long, and his body was partially eroded, just to squat on an elixir, but he was attacked by several terrifying purple light creatures at a critical moment, and he was unlucky to enter an area with extremely rich purple light, and his body was completely corroded, coupled with serious injuries and dying, he finally fell and died.

Although this Heavenly Monarch has fallen, it has attracted more Heavenly Monarchs to enter the core area of the Purple Light World, because there are greater opportunities.

The Heavenly Monarch List is so powerful, now the opportunity of the Great Universe is basically useless to them, they have been in the Great Universe for so long, they have barely made a move, and their strength has not improved much, they are simply very aggrieved.

Now, the Purple Light World contained treasures that were of great help to them, how could they endure it, so some of the Heavenly Monarchs entered the core area of the Purple Light World, including the Pengyu Heavenly Monarch of the Void Heaven Palace.

But all this has nothing to do with Ye Tian for the time being, although he thinks he is very powerful, he is not arrogant enough to be able to compete with the Heavenly Monarch for the opportunity, so if there is a finger, he can be killed by one finger.

At this moment, he was attacking the seventh layer of the Xuanxuan Jue with all his strength, striving to cultivate the seventh layer of the Xuanxu Jue to the Dacheng realm, so that he could step into the eight-star peak divine general's combat power.

In a flash, 3,000 years have passed.

On this day, Ye Tian finally broke the shackles, and the seventh layer of the Xuanxu Jue was completed, and his combat power stepped into the eight-star peak god general.

On the ancestral monument, the list of god generals was updated, and the combat power of Ye Tian's eight-star peak god generals shocked the entire universe.
